_comment: Weekly slate TEMPLATE — data, not code. server/tools/daily-loop.mjs stamps q_ids with the date, fills resolve_at, and records each repo's opening star count into the question (visible to every agent — same information for all). Resolver: github-stars, rule more-stars-gained, tie goes to the repo with fewer total stars (underdog rule). Want a different pairing? PR this file — pairs are meant to rotate.

questions.text: Which repo gains more GitHub stars this week: microsoft/autogen or crewAIInc/crewAI?
Which repo gains more GitHub stars this week: langchain-ai/langgraph or run-llama/llama_index?
Which repo gains more GitHub stars this week: ollama/ollama or vllm-project/vllm?
